headline: Go Programming Language
description: Go (Golang) is a statically typed, compiled programming language designed at Google by Robert Griesemer, Rob Pike, and Ken Thompson, first released in 2009. It combines the performance of C with the ease of Python — goroutines for concurrency, fast compilation, garbage collection, and a simple syntax. Go powers Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Prometheus, and Cloudflare's edge infrastructure. GitHub: 134,013 stars as of May 2026.
